name: Bultungin
description: The Bultungin, a fearsome creature from African folklore, primarily associated with the Sahel region and West Africa, is a shape-shifting hyena. It is believed to be a human sorcerer or witch who can transform into a hyena at will, often for malevolent purposes. These beings are said to roam the night, preying on livestock and even humans. The transformation is not merely physical; it involves a spiritual change, imbuing the Bultungin with enhanced strength, speed, and cunning. They are often associated with dark magic and are feared for their ability to bring misfortune. Some tales suggest that the Bultungin retains some human intelligence and can even communicate with other hyenas. The creature's existence highlights the cultural beliefs surrounding witchcraft and the dangers lurking in the shadows, embodying the fears and anxieties of rural communities.
subtitle: Shape-shifting hyena witch of the night
appearance: The Bultungin appears as a large, powerful hyena, often larger and more muscular than a typical hyena. Its eyes might glow with an unnatural light, and its fur might be darker or more matted than a normal hyena. In some accounts, it may retain subtle human features, such as oddly shaped paws or a disconcerting expression in its eyes. When in human form, they are often described as secretive individuals with unsettling demeanor.
habitat: The Bultungin is said to inhabit rural areas, particularly near villages and farms, in the Sahel region and West Africa. They are most active at night, prowling the outskirts of settlements in search of prey. They prefer areas with dense vegetation or rocky terrain where they can easily hide and ambush their victims.
behavior: The Bultungin is primarily nocturnal and predatory. It is believed to hunt livestock, particularly goats and sheep, but may also attack humans if the opportunity arises. They are cunning and intelligent predators, capable of planning ambushes and luring victims into traps. In their human form, they are often secretive and withdrawn, avoiding social interaction and engaging in suspicious activities.

keyMyths.title: The Witch's Transformation
keyMyths.description: A sorcerer uses dark magic to transform into a hyena, terrorizing a village and preying on their livestock. Eventually, a brave hunter discovers their secret and finds a way to break the curse or end the Bultungin's reign of terror.

sources.author: Ibn Khaldun
sources.description: Mentions beliefs about people transforming into hyenas in North Africa.
sources.text: Mentions beliefs about people transforming into hyenas in North Africa.

sources.author: Various
sources.description: Collection of stories featuring shape-shifting hyena-like creatures.
sources.text: Collection of stories featuring shape-shifting hyena-like creatures.
